ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nominations" (
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nomination */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being nominated */,
  "award_event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the award event */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the nomination */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the nomination (e.g., Nominated, Won) */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference link to the source of the nomination information */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the nomination was submitted */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "nomination_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the nomination */,
  "jury_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the jury or judges */,
  "attachment_link" TEXT /* Link to any supporting documents or media */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nomination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_award_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_event_id") REFERENCES award_events ("award_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "developer" INTEGER /* Developer of the game */,
  "publisher" INTEGER /* Publisher of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "platforms" TEXT /* Platforms on which the game is available */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Age rating of the game */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_developer FOREIGN KEY ("developer") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_publisher FOREIGN KEY ("publisher") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_events" (
  "award_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the award event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the award event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Venue or location of the event */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the award category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for the award category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the developer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the developer */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the developer was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the publisher */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, publisher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nomination being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the nomination */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the nomination was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_nomination_id FOREIGN KEY ("nomination_id") REFERENCES nominations ("nomination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
